evals.prompt: /infrastructure-coder generate terraform s3 bucket with encryption
evals.expected_output: Generates pinned Terraform module using variables, least-privilege, tags, and no latest.
assertions: Agent dispatches to generate / IaC mode.
Pins provider versions and resource versions; never 'latest'.
Includes for_each where named, resource limits if K8s, health checks.

evals.prompt: Add a Kubernetes deployment for the api with resource limits
evals.expected_output: IaC request for K8s activates infrastructure-coder.
assertions: Always includes CPU/memory requests+limits, securityContext non-root.
Routes CI/CD aspects to devops-engineer if mixed.

evals.prompt: Set up the GitHub Actions to deploy this terraform
evals.expected_output: Handoff: deployment pipeline to devops-engineer; this skill owns only IaC definitions.
assertions: Names devops-engineer as the correct skill for pipeline.
May generate the tf but not the workflow.

evals.prompt: /infrastructure-coder generate and apply the dockerfile changes
evals.expected_output: Presents IaC + review plan; approval gate before suggesting terraform apply or edits.
assertions: Always run analysis script before review output.
Presents review findings grouped by severity before any mutation suggestion.
No direct apply; read-only generation + review until user approves.

evals.prompt: What will this K8s cluster cost per month?
evals.expected_output: Refuses absolute pricing; uses relative comparisons only.

evals.prompt: /infrastructure-coder create iam role for the lambda
evals.expected_output: Generates least-privilege IAM; flags overly permissive.
assertions: Never generates broad * actions without justification.
